E L E G A N C E A T E V E R Y G L A N C E S T R I K I N G .

P O W E R F U L .

# Creative visualization. Digitally created visual. Picture of vehicle was not taken while driving.

Experience a new age of fun, dynamic driving with the elegant Camry.

Founded on a legacy of power and luxury over two decades ago, the new Camry now feels personal, emotional, and sporty. The new Camry’s reﬁned performance and design let you chase your daily thrills in style. A sedan to the core, it comes with hybrid eﬃciency and various drive modes that ﬁt your lifestyle perfectly.

Experience silent drives with a quiet and peaceful cabin.

P R E S E N T I N G T H E N E W E L E G A N T C A M R Y H Y B R I D

Sporting the latest hybrid system, the new Camry boasts a powerful 2.5L Hybrid Electric Vehicle (HEV) engine, which is the capable of producing combined power of 169 kW, oﬀering dynamic performance for an exhilarating driving experience. Make every drive not just smoother, but more eco-friendly too.

Powered by Toyota’s 5th Generation Hybrid Technology with a high-capacity lithium-ion battery, which provides best-in-class fuel eﬃciency of 25.49 km/l*, delivering both robust performance and sustainable mobility.

Discover the all-new 5th generation Hybrid system

* Fuel eﬃciency as certiﬁed by test agency under rule 115 of CMVR, 1989 under standard test conditions.

T&C apply. Actual mileage on road may vary.

#Creative visualization. Digitally created visual. Picture of vehicle was not taken while driving.

E X P E R I E N C E E L E G A N C E T H A T ’ S E N E R G E T I C The new Camry is both at once, inspired by technology and a sense of simple sophistication that’s mindful. Create memorable ﬁrst impressions with its bold exterior, its sleek rooﬂine, low stance with a hammer-head design. The signature DRL, clearance lamp and front-turn signal lamp together give a feeling of innovation and luxury.

Tight characteristic spokes of the 45.72 cm Alloy Wheels create a sporty look.

Alloy Wheels The bold rear combination lamp, featuring LED brake lights, enhances the vehicle's sporty look.

Rear Lamp The Premium Body Coating provides a rich glossy ﬁnish.

Body Coating

A V I S U A L S Y M P H O N Y T H A T G O E S B E Y O N D T H E S U R F A C E Take control at the tap of a ﬁnger Experience a driving revolution with our innovative 31.24 cm Multi-Information Display, delivering high-quality graphics that ensure personalized comfort and control. Seamlessly switch between three dynamic drive modes, Eco, Sport and Normal, tailored to oﬀer you a truly customized journey.

Enjoy fast, intuitive entertainment on the 31.24 cm Multimedia Display, elegantly integrated into a guitar-shaped sculpture, where the strings ﬂow gracefully toward the passenger vent. With wireless Apple CarPlay® and Android Auto™ there’s no better way to drive.

Apple CarPlay® is a registered trademark of Apple Inc. Android AutoTM is a registered trademark of Google Inc.

Sit back in elegant comfort The new Camry oﬀers enhanced comfort for daily drives with its elegantly designed interiors.

Enjoy reﬁned, stylish leather-trimmed seats with a modern high-intensity ﬁnish. Elevate elegance with luxurious, plush interiors. The rear passengers also have control over their journey with the ability to adjust their environment at the touch of a button, reclining seats, regulating the temperature of the air-conditioning, changing audio channels, and volume or even raising or lowering the rear sunshade. Put your lifestyle at the forefront with a dynamic and encompassing feeling.

The sporty look is enhanced further with a Moon Roof with Tilt and Slide function.

Moon Roof The new Camry’s Head-Up Display gives you access to time-sensitive information.

Head-up Display Electronic Drive Seat Adjustment With 10N-way power adjustability for both driver and front passenger, every individual can ﬁnd their ideal seating position.

Eﬀortlessly adjust forward and backward, raise or lower the height, ﬁne-tune thigh support, recline for optimal comfort, and customize lumbar support for the perfect ﬁt.

Premium 9 N-speaker JBL™ Audio System Ensure your drives always have a soundtrack that’s a delight to listen to, with the perfect balance of bass and treble provided by the 9 N-speaker JBL system.

Wireless Charger nanoe™ X Technology # Enjoy enhanced air quality with a technology that neutralizes odours and eliminates bacteria and allergens, creating a fresher and healthier cabin environment.

Staying ready for whatever your digital day has in store couldn’t be easier. Simply place your Qi-compatible smartphone on the wider wireless charging pad and let the Camry handle the charging while you enjoy the drive.

3N-Zone Air-conditioning Enjoy every journey in perfect comfort where passengers on front seats and rear seats can tailor the temperature to suit their individual preferences.

#nanoeTM and the nanoeTM logo are trademarks of Panasonic Corporation.

JBL™ is a trademark of Harman International Industries, Inc.

Toyota Safety SenseTM 3.0 is a suite of advanced safety features designed to enhance your driving experience and provide added peace of mind on the road. With cutting-edge technology and intelligent systems, TSS works tirelessly to protect the passengers while ensuring a smoother, more conﬁdent drive.

– Lane Trace Assist

– Lane Departure Alert

– Pre-Collision Alert

– Dynamic Radar Cruise Control

– Automatic High Beam Toyota Safety Sense™ (TSS) is registered trademark of Toyota Motor Corporation.

The driver is always responsible for paying attention to the vehicle surroundings & driving safely as there are limitations to a degree of recognition & controlling performance that the Toyota Safety Sense™ system can provide.

The driver is always responsible for paying attention to the vehicle surroundings & driving safely as there are limitations to a degree of recognition & controlling performance that the Toyota Safety Sense™ system can provide.

Keeps your vehicle centered in its lane for a safer and more relaxed driving experience.

Lane Trace Assist Equipped with a Pre-Collision System for proactive hazard detection and accident prevention.

Pre-Collision System Lane Departure Alert Get alerts if the vehicle unintentionally drifts out of its lane, enhancing safety on the road.

The driver is always responsible for paying attention to the vehicle surroundings & driving safely as there are limitations to a degree of recognition & controlling performance that the Toyota Safety Sense™ system can provide.

Automatically adjusts the headlights for optimal visibility depending on road conditions.

Automatic High Beam

Improve parking and manoeuvring in narrow spaces for smoother navigation, with greater visibility and control.

360-degree Panoramic View Monitoring Dynamic Radar Cruise Control Go on cruise mode with full speed range capability.

#Rear Seat Entertainment is not part of standard ﬁtment from TKM. These accessories are developed by third party supplier and ﬁtted after sales of product at dealership at the option of customers. nanoeTM and the nanoeTM logo are trademarks of Panasonic Corporation.

Yellow brown leather materials used are mix of genuine and synthetic leather.

F E A T U R E S

• New 2.5L dynamic force engine for ultimate performance and joy of driving

• Transmission – e-CVT (electronic - continuously variable transmission) available across sport, eco, normal driving modes

• Sequential Shift mode for manual like drive feeling

• 5th generation Toyota hybrid system comes with advanced and lighter lithium-ion battery

• An optimally tuned MacPherson strut suspension (front) and double wishbone (rear) has been adopted in pursuit of ride comfort and enhancing the handling performance.

Performance Features

• Low nose along with the body side and rear design gives an aggressive sporty look

• Signature Daytime Running Light (DRL) system equipped with LED

• Stylish hood and fender with sophisticated bumper and grille

• Outside Rear-View Mirror (ORVM) with automatic retractable, turn signal, auto-reverse tilt for a seamless driving experience

• Newly designed alloy wheels enhance sportiness

• High Solar Energy Absorbing (HSEA) UV-cut glass

• Spacious cabin adorned with soft upholstery, consistency of materials across seat, instrument panel and door.

Metal ﬁnishes are uniﬁed in a modern sophisticated high-intensity silver ﬁnish

• All new yellow brown soft leather upholstery

• Ornament instrument panel

• Piano black front console box

• Power windows with auto up/down and jam protection (all windows)

• Guitar-shaped audio garnish

• 3N-zone climate control system

• A nanoeTM X Ion generator for enhanced comfort and freshness

• Interior illumination package/entry system (fade-out smart room lamp + door inside handles + 4N footwell lamps) Exterior Features - Dynamic Design & Style

Interior Features

• Toyota’s i-connect telematic connected car features with Data Communication Module (DCM) for enhanced convenience and connectivity

• 10N-way power adjust for driver & passenger seat with lumbar support (driver seat with memory)

• Rear armrest with touch-control switches for audio, rear seat recline, rear sunshade and climate control

• Rear power sunshade, rear door manual sunshades

• New 31.24 cm Multi-Information Display (MID), a full graphic meter providing vivid graphics and excellent display quality

• Moon Roof with tilt and slide function

• 25.65 cm rotatable high resolution rear seat entertainment#

• Ventilated front seats

• Two-way front headrest for utmost comfort

• Easy access function on passenger seat

• Smart entry system with start/stop button

• Memory settings for outer rear-view mirror (ORVM), driver seat and steering position

• Power-assisted tilt/telescopic steering column with memory

• Wireless smartphone charger [Qi-compatible phones]

• Automatic rain-sensing wipers

• Rear seats with power recline and trunk access

• Electrochromic inside rear-view mirror,

• Front & rear door courtesy lamps

• Genuine leather steering wheel with audio, infotainment, telephone control and driving assist (TSS, DRCC, LTA)

• Head-up display (HUD) with essential operation information

• Smart & electric back door release

• Rear USB charging ports - 12 V x 2 N (type-C)

• Rear window defogger with timer Comfort & Convenience

Avoid using the phone while driving for your safety.

Apple CarPlay® is a registered trademark of Apple Inc. Android AutoTM is a registered trademark of Google Inc.

JBL™ is a trademark of Harman International Industries, Inc. Bluetooth is a registered trademark of Bluetooth SIG.

For more details on the functioning of SRS airbags, please refer to the owner’s manual.

#Toyota Safety Sense™ (TSS) is a registered trademark of Toyota Motor Corporation. The driver is always responsible for paying attention to the vehicle surroundings & driving safely as there are limitations to a degree of recognition & controlling performance that the Toyota Safety Sense™ system can provide.

• Vehicle stability and traction control (with oﬀ switch)

• Electric power steering with speed sensing function

• Parking assist: back guide monitor, clearance and back sonar

• Impact sensing fuel cut-oﬀ

• Speed sensing door auto-lock

• Tyre pressure monitoring system

• Front & rear seatbelt warning with buzzer

• Hill start assist control

• Uphill/downhill assist for comfortably smooth and responsive driving.

• Smart key remind warning

• Immobilizer with alarm

• 31.24 cm multimedia system with information and entertainment, thereby ensuring personalized comfort

• 9 N-speaker premium JBLTM audio system

• Navigation, AM/FM, USB, Aux-in, bluetooth, wireless Apple CarPlay® & Android AutoTM, car information system, apps

• Onboard navigation service with personalized assistance

Infotainment Safety Features

• Toyota Safety SenseTM (TSS) # that includes safety features like:

- LTA (Lane Tracing Assist) for enhanced lane-keeping

- LDA (Lane Departure Alert) to alert the driver and gentle corrective steering to keep in the lane

- PCS (Pre-Collision System) for proactive safety

- DRCC (Dynamic radar cruise control) with full-speed range with increased convenience

- AHB (Automatic High Beam) for Automated High/Low beam operations

• 9 N SRS airbags [front driver & passenger, front side, rear side, curtain shield, driver knee]

• 360-degree panoramic rear-view monitor improve parking and manoeuvring in narrow spaces for smoother navigation

• Anti-lock braking system with electronic brake-force distribution and brake assist

• Front 3-point ELR [Emergency Locking Retractor] seat belt with Pre-tensioner & Force-limiter

• ISOFIX and top tether anchor for child seats

• Rear seat reminder function ensures collection of luggage, etc.

• Vehicle approach notice system

• Electronic parking brake with brake hold function

A C C E S S O R I E S

Safety Connect Remotely disable your car ignition if it falls into the wrong hands.

Remote Immobilization Keep a close eye on your vehicle health status.

Vehicle Health Report Get alerted instantly if your car is being tampered with.

Theft Alarm Through the in-car SOS button, you can contact emergency call center.

SOS Button Remote Connect Find My Car Access the location of your car with i-Connect.

Remote Trunk (Lock/Unlock) Now lock/unlock your trunk through i-Connect.

Remotely start/stop your car.

Remote Start/Stop Remote Seat Ventilation Remotely execute the ventilation in your seats with i-Connect.

To take full control of your Vehicle, Toyota i-Connect oﬀers                   features that let you monitor & control your vehicle with a smartphone or voice command when you are not near it.
